description:
Welcome Zwifter to the Scannellatori Seriali’s fastest races. It’s a Series where each race gives you points. I suggest you to follow us on instagram https://www.instagram.com/scannellatori_seriali/ @scannellatori_seriali or facebook for the results.

I invite you also to join our great Team Scannellatori Seriali and have the chance to unlock our Jersey.

name: Flanders Monday Blues Ride
description:
Join us Flandriens at this slowly paced group ride. It’s a 1.5-2 w/kg "recovery" group ride. 

The ride is simple, stick with the LEADER and you'll have a great time !
The Fence will be used to make sure we have a ride without fliers.

Please follow the LEADER’s instructions to make it pleasant for all the participants !

Late joining is possible ...

#keepmoving

name: GXY ORBIT [1.7-2.3 WKG] CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY ORBIT the ride with a twin space shuttle workout theme!
A 60 minute journey where the yellow and red beacons fly together as space shuttles bringing a workout that includes
blast offs, thrusts and power shifts whilst keeping all the riders in one aerodynamic blob. .
What is for certain, is that this ride has a completely different style and vibe and brings a fun atmosphere whilst we
work together
Please take a break from the norm and join us with our ORBIT ride, it's guaranteed to bring a smile to your face with
jokes, friendly banter whilst undertaking an achievable zonal workout at the same time to achieve your fitness goals.
GXY are a friendly inclusive and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding
with you today.
If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally
via our Facebook link below:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: EVOLVE 15km Road Race
description:
EVENT DESCRIPTION
Join Team Evolve for the EVOLVE 15km Road Race, utilizing the Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) system to match cyclists of all levels in a dynamic, community-driven virtual peloton. This Category Enforced event requires a smart trainer/power meter and heart rate monitor, grouping riders by their ZRS (0-1000 scale), fostering a competitive yet fair atmosphere.

ZRS FAQ: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

About Us
At Team Evolve, we are more than just a group of athletes we are a dynamic and inclusive community united by our passion for a wide range of activities, both virtual and outdoor. Whether you’re into structured training, social rides, running, swimming, or simply
staying active in any form, you’ll discover a welcoming and supportive environment here.

For more information visit our website www.teamevolve.cc and join us on our Discord Server: https://discord.gg/teamevolve

name: ZHCC RUBBERBAND CLUB
description:
Join Lee ZHCC Founder and Head Honch to start the week with a 100% guaranteed no drop ride (unless you stop pedalling) meaning you stay with the group riding at your own pace? If you want the experience of a group ride with no drop and no nasty fence then this might be just what you are looking for. Our ZHCC Rubber Band Club has the “rubber-band” activated which means that no matter what level you are, you will be able to keep up and the group WILL STAY TOGETHER. The rubber band allows you to ride at your own pace, slow or fast and you are guaranteed to stay in the group.

In this supportive environment it’s a great way of completing a full 1-hour ride knowing you won’t get dropped or get dragged along by those naughty fliers!
ZHCC do not race each other, we ride as one, have fun and enjoy a group ride.
The ZHCC gang look forward to riding with you.
STRAVA : https://www.strava.com/clubs/518792
ZHCC Facebook page - https://www.facebook.com/groups/1163022533747527/
DISCORD : https://www.discord.gg/ukSdEQd

name: ZRG-CC - Afterwork Ride
description:
Kick-in your week with a medium paced endurance ride hosted by ZRG Cycling Club. Aimed at building endurance, giving an attained workout and curing hangovers from last weekend. Our group ride event is designed with an intensity range between 2.6-3.2 W/kg but may include short intervals well over and below the ride average parameters pushing you to the sky. 

Teamwork is essential, we aim to support each other. Please stay together as a group around the Yellow Beacon at all times. We don’t chase flyers, it’s not a race. Fence will be available, only varied to allow for hill climbs or planned sprints with immediate regrouping afterwards. Sweepers are not in operation. Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help sweep the riders struggling back to the pack. Be sure to listen to the ride leader’s instructions.

Nobody likes being dropped. But things get stretched and this is not a “no drop ride”. If you’re fall of the back of the pack missing the draft effect means you are lost. You need to pace significantly over main group pace to bridge the gap and catch. Otherwise check the mini-map for riders around you, form a gruppetto with them and support each other.

You can find more information about upcoming events in our Facebook community (https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftRidersGermany/) and we welcome any feedback. If you get through the event you will unlock the ZwiftRidersGermany Jersey. Late joining is available. 

Join us for as long as you want, enjoy your training and make new Zwift buddies. 
Have a good time. #FunIsFast

--
Find us on strava at https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift-riders-germany
Please, join us on Discord at https://discord.gg/tv567Pv
And, Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftRidersGermany/

#zrg

description:
Keep Fit during the winter months by joining in with Bridgwater Cycling Club Monday evening workout sessions.

Join our Zwift club! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/24084e77-f3d3-4ff2-af2d-04f5b6b3cee0/join

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Zwift Epic Race - Downtown Dolphin
description:
Join us as we take on some slightly more challenging race routes!

For more Epic Races, please join the club on the Companion App: https://www.zwift.com/clubs/a1ea0324-7f4a-46a7-8547-a7a3246e349b/home

All racers will start together, so make sure you're ready at the start!

WHAT IS ZWIFTPOWER? 
For further information on connecting to ZwiftPower, check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note: For your results to show up in ZwiftPower, you must use a heart rate monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter. 

Check out zwift.com/racing for more information on how you can participate in other events offered by Zwift and the community to have a great racing experience.

#zwiftofficial

name: Bikealicious Zone 2 Fat Burner Ride
description: This is a rubberband Zone 2 fat-burning ride. While the primary goal is to maintain a Zone 2 intensity, feel free to ride at any pace you prefer. We have riders of all levels; all are welcome. We support less experienced riders and draw inspiration from those with more strength and expertise. This is a social ride, so don't be afraid to jump in and chat

name: ZWB Cycling - Monday Ride
description:
Welcome to the weekly ZWB Cycling - Monday Ride! In the Zwift Racing League weeks we use this ride as a recon ride for the upcoming ZRL race. We ride the route together, point out the key segments and share tips & tricks. We aim to keep the pace steady but approachable. In weeks without a ZRL race we’ll pick a random route that still provides you with a good training session and a fun group ride.

ZWB Cycling is a Dutch cycling club and community. Thinking about joining us or looking for details? Visit www.zwbcycling.nl or leave us a message on Discord.

name: It's always a race "group ride" with DZR
description:
We set out to create a group ride, but let’s be honest: every group ride is really a race. So we’re making it official: this is a race. No categories. No separation. Everyone together. Sort it out on the road!

Choose your route: Long or Short. But don’t be fooled. Both will hurt! This isn’t a coffee ride.

But we’re nice people after all… we’ll throw you a bone: at least one route will be Route of the Week for bonus XP.

Rules: No PowerUps • No zPower • HRM required. Plain and simple, as it should be.

Find out more about Danish Zwift Racers at www.dzrracingseries.com

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: PACK🐺 Social + KOM After Party
description:
Join the PACK and experience a fun social group ride with an average lap pace of around 2w/kg. Everyone is welcome so come and enjoy the friendly supportive atmosphere with late join enabled if you miss the start. The Leader will always be at the correct pace, giving out instructions to help new riders as communication is the key to a good group ride.

After the event finishes, there is an optional fun After Party KOM challenge up the final climb. Ride with others or try to beat your HoloReplay.

All riders will appear in the same kit and you can optionally add (PACK) after your name to show support of the group. Please respect the pace set by the leader, this is a group ride not a race. #strongertogether

Finally, if you are just starting your zwift experience, please join our facebook group and PACK Club for tips on group riding, friendly advice and to answer any questions you have.

PACK Club:
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/Pack/join

Facebook Group #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

PACK Events:
https://zwift.com/events/tag/pack

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

https://www.zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=2928

name: Squadra Castelli - Sweat Sesh
description:
Ready to crush your endurance goals? 🚴‍♂️💪
Training for a Gran Fondo or just getting in shape for the year? We’ve got your back.

🔥 What’s the deal?
Expect stamina-boosting sessions all with a good dose of fun and an awesome community to keep you motivated. We'd love to have you along for the ride!

🎯 Why join?
✅ Build serious endurance and fitness
🎁 Unlock exclusive Castelli kits
🙌🏽 Ride with an inspiring global crew

It’s open to everyone, just complete an FTP test to set your baseline and you’re good to go.

Let’s make 2026 the year you smash it on the saddle. ✨

name: Norwegian Watts Club Group Ride
description:
Hey Zwifters!

Ready to roll with the coolest crew on the virtual roads? The Norwegian Watts Club is hosting a group ride and you're officially invited! Whether you're chasing watts or just cruising for good vibes, this is your hour to shine.

Everyone is welcome — no gatekeeping, no ego, just good company and smooth pedaling. Our ride leader will cruise at a friendly pace of 1.7–2.0 W/kg, with a little extra spice on the climbs (because gravity doesn’t care about your feelings 😅).

Stick close to the yellow beacon—that’s our golden glue keeping the group together. If you find yourself drifting off or facing technical gremlins, our trusty sweepers will swoop in like cycling superheroes to bring you back into the fold.

So bring your watts, your chat, and your best socks. Let’s make this ride one to remember!

See you on the start line 🚴‍♂️💨

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Workout for Women
description:
ZTPL Cycling Club ma przyjemność zaprosić na wspólny trening grupowy przeznaczony tylko dla kobiet.
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!

Poniedziałkowe treningi grupowe na Zwift są dla każdego! Jedziemy i trenujemy wspólnie wg. zaplanowanych bloków treningowych (interwałów), które u każdego z uczestników są dostosowane do aktualnego poziomu wytrenowania (indywidualnie ustawione FTP), co sprawia, że wszyscy jedziemy w tej samej grupie, nikt nie zostaje. name: Team CLS Racing - Pace 'n' Race: Recon and Activation
description:
A perfect activation ride ahead of Tuesday racing, or simply an enjoyable ride to start the week! 

This is ideal for racers participating in ZRL or DRS as this will often be a great recon opportunity on an upcoming route. Outside of these series, you will always have an enjoyable blast on a favorite route.

The ride will hold a steady pace to get the legs going and towards the end we will aim to form a PACE group that will remain steady, and a RACE group that will have the opportunity to get in a mini effort/race as a short blast to the finish!


Information and Rules
• Please follow the beacon's calls to ensure the group remains smooth and everyone gets the most out of the event.
• The Fence will be used and it is 'live' so if you go ahead of the group for too long, you will be removed from the event. 


WEEKLY PROGRAM
Mon  18:50 UK - Team CLS Racing - Pace ‘n’ Race: Recon and Activation 
Tues 18:50 UK - This ‘n’ That - Endurance Training
Wed  18:50 UK - Ride ‘n’ Explore Club Rideout
Thur 18:50 UK - High ‘n’ Low - Interval Training
Sat  08:50 and 14:45 UK - Base ‘n’ Banter Endurance ride
Sun  18:50 UK - Chill 'n' Spin - Weekend Social [Kit unlock]

TEAM CLS LINKS
Check out www.teamclscc.co.uk ...find out about our club, current events and leaders. 

Facebook Club Site - https://www.facebook.com/groups/teamclscc
Facebook Racing Site - https://www.facebook.com/groups/teamclsracing
Zwift Power Team - https://www.zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=1426


TEAM | CLS - Training | Racing | Community

name: The HERD Kickstart
description:
The ride to kickstart your week! Our goal is to have fun, blow off some Monday steam and start our week like we want it to go on. Pace is 1.6 – 1.9 w/kg. We also select ride leader/courses that don't disadvantage heavier riders.

WE USE THE FENCE! The fence is in place to remind you to stay with the YELLOW BEACON.

This is a group ride and not a race, so please ride with the YELLOW BEACON. Stronger riders are encouraged to fall back and help the sweep team.

Join us on Discord during the ride to participate in audio conversation with one another. It will help the time pass by and give you a safe space to ask all the questions you have about Zwift, without feeling uncomfortable or risk being judged.

name: Team Not Pogi - Total Non-Stop Power iTT Series
description:
Come join TNP in our monthly Individual Time Trial Series
We will be racing every Monday against the clock
GC will be decided on points not time, 1st place gets 1 point,
20th gets 20 etc - lowest total wins
Multiple Time slots available

name: WCC Wobble Group Workout
description:
Welcome to WCC’s Wobble Group Workout.

On this workout ride you will be completing this banded workout at your own FTP. Each workout will be lead by one of WCC’s great social ride leaders who will offer reminders to hydrate as well as encouragement throughout the 30-45 minute sessions.

All prompts for changed in power, cadence, ect will be tailored to your specific FTP on this banded ride without the concern of being dropped off the back of the group as long as you keep the cranks spinning.

We will be making use of Zwift’s Ari ours workout plans rotating through a variety of skills as we move throughout the different sessions within the plan..

If you are looking to join WCC we can be found at any of the following links…

Via Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/groups/2665592713734072/?ref=share

website
https://www.wobblecycleclub.com

Or via the Club on the ZC app
https://www.zwift.com/clubs/wcc/home

name: GXY BLAST OFF! [1-1.4 WKG] CAT D
description:
Welcome to GXY BLAST OFF!
Please join us as we set off on our weekly visit into the Zwift world at a beginners/recovery pace.
Blast off by name… but steady as we go, whilst we ride around predominantly flat or slightly undulating courses with
power and speed maintained to suite everyone on this GALAXY no drop ride.
A designated social discord channel is available to just chat or to learn from experienced leaders about how to get the
most out of your journey on the Zwift platform.
We ride as one under the guidance of an experienced leader and sweepers who are there to help and support you.
Their primary aim is of course to keep the group together whilst sharing knowledge and making the ride fun and
enjoyable for everyone.
GXY are a friendly and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding with you
on this, our launchpad ride.
If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally
via our Facebook link or by the email below:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

eventSubgroups.name: GXY BLAST OFF! [1-1.4 WKG] CAT D (D)

name: Phoenix Rising From the Saddle
description:
From the Saddle is Phoenix Rising's highER paced ride. The leader will aim to stay between 1.9 and 2.2 w/kg, adjusting the speed slightly to keep the group together, especially up hills.
Occasionally this will be a chase ride on a crit-type course where the leader will keep pacing with the intent to get everyone to lap them.

For more information on all our weekly events, join our club Phoenix Rising on Zwift Companion.

Join us on Discord during the ride: https://discord.gg/mNMva8ekJR
Check us out on Facebook https://www.facebook.com/groups/615972979730125/

name: The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing
description:
Join Herd Racing for our monthly TT challenge. For the month of January
it's 2 laps of Handful of Gravel. You can race this as many times as you'd
like and try to beat your time and your best time counts in the monthly
standings https://zwiftpower.com/league.php?id=3093

For these events drafting is turned off, so it's just you and the clock. Is
the gravel, the MTB or the TT bike fastest? Maybe even a road bike?!?!
Pick your fastest equipment and give it your best shot! Join us in the Herd
Racing League facebook or Discord server to chat pacing strategies, gear,
and more.
https://discord.gg/DrAXaCb7Tq

eventSubgroups.name: The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing (A)
The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing (B)
The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing (C)
The Stampede Challenge by Herd Racing (D)

name: Sledgehammer Inbetweeners Races
description:
Welcome to the Sledgehammer series.
These races are designed to equalise the categories as much as possible and encourage team riding between riders of different strengths. Please enter your appropriate category according to your Zwiftpower race category.
All out of category entrants will be excluded from the Zwiftpower results.
Organiser's Facebook page: https://www.facebook.com/groups/2388754431339748/
Race, steer, draft. Team up and chase those faster riders!

name: Ventouro Social Group Ride
description:
A fun morning ride to get the legs turning for the week. Enjoy being part of a group and riding to your ability. The ride is generally led by ex Pro Tour rider and double Olympian Tim Gudsell, or one of Ventouro’s great crew.

The ride starts steady and moderate pace most around the flat streets of London (2-2.5w/kg) no need to load up the watts more than 100w. There will be a fence on just after the start so please respect it. It comes off after 14km.
It starts climbing at KM 13. With 5km up hill and the last 2km being the steepest. Then a fast run down to the finish.
It will split on the hill, so you can go for gold to the finish, or keep it in zone and make your way up at a steady pace. Enjoy!

Ventouro is an adventure cycling business offering guided tours of the world's most beautiful destinations. From weekend retreats in New Zealand's wine regions, to week-long journeys through the fjords of Norway, The Great Wall of China, or the French Alps.

From a standing start in 2014 Ventouro has established itself as a globally recognised luxury-cycling business with an established high-net-worth client-base in America, China, Australia and New Zealand.

name: Team KST's "Le Rouleur" Race
description:
Team KST’s “Le Rouleur” Race

Team Koege SportsTerapi bring you this serie of weekly races. The “Le Rouleur serie” is four races every week. Why the name “Le Rouleur” ?
because a true Rouleur is a rider who is considered a good all-rounder.

So prepare yourself to be challenged in different terrains. Our courses have it all: Flat, hilly, mountain, downhill or sprint you name it…. you got it.
By winning the different races you will prove to yourself and your surroundings, that you are a true Rouleur.

These races requires the best of you.
We aim for a good and fair race and a great work out.


Important
Rules
- No TT Bikes
- Push Up allowed
- Choose right Cat.
- Enter right weight
The rest is pretty simpel… ride as hard as you can:)

“Gas Geben”

FOLLOW TEAM KST Fan page on FB page

https://www.facebook.com/Team-KST-powered-by-Køge-SportsTerapi-101151418716498/

name: TNP The No Prisoners Power Test April 5 Minute Power Challenge Week 1
description:
This is a month long challenge running throughout April, designed to test one of the most important efforts in Zwift racing.
Three Sisters Reverse Race distance: 6.9 km (lead in 3.2 km, segment length 3.7 km)
Zwift races are often won or lost in efforts around five minutes. Short climbs, hard attacks, and decisive selections usually happen in that window. If you can produce strong power for five minutes, you can stay with the front when races split. This challenge is designed to test exactly that. Hit some of Zwift’s most iconic climbs full gas and see how your best time stacks up.
"No April fools here. Just power, passion and heart. Short lead in.
One climb.
Fastest time wins.

Full gas. No prisoners."
Results will be on https://team-not-pogi-hub.vercel.app/

name: ZTPLCC / PrawiePro / RatajCyclistCoach
description:
ZTPL Cycling Club wraz z Leszkiem https://prawie.pro/ oraz Dawidem RatajCyclistCoach https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/ ma przyjemność zaprosić na wspólny trening grupowy przeznaczony dla początkujących.

Jeśli dopiero zaczynacie przygodę ze Zwift lub planami treningowymi, ten event jest dla Was! Podczas naszych cotygodniowych spotkań będziecie mieli okazję poznać podstawy treningu. Treningi będzie układał specjalnie dla Was Dawid (zachęcamy do odwiedzin jego instagrama - inspiruje!) a poprowadzi je Leszek.

Każdy z treningów będzie zakładał stosunkowo małe obciążenie, będziemy poruszać się w strefach S2 - S3, oczywiście z biegiem czasu nie można wykluczyć że pojawią się akcenty, bo jak wiemy #JakBoliToRośnie 😉
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka, a jeśli nie macie jeszcze ciuchów od Leszka to wpadajcie do niego do sklepu www.prawie.pro

Jedziemy i trenujemy wspólnie wg. zaplanowanych bloków treningowych (interwałów), które u każdego z uczestników są dostosowane do aktualnego poziomu wytrenowania (indywidualnie ustawione FTP), co sprawia, że wszyscy jedziemy w tej samej grupie, nikt nie zostaje. Więcej o treningach na Zwift znajdziecie na stronie http://ztpl.cc/treningi-na-zwift/

◾️Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc
◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/

◾️Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/182377
◾️Nasz klub w Companionie: https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/ztplcc
◾️Nasze wszystkie klubowe jazdy: https://www.zwift.com/eu/events/tag/ztplcc
◾️Nasza strona internetowa: https://ztpl.cc/

#RideOn #ZTPLCC

[ENG]
ZTPL Cycling Club, together with Leszek (https://prawie.pro/) and Dawid (RatajCyclistCoach) (https://www.instagram.com/ratajcyclistcoach/), is pleased to invite you to a group training session dedicated to beginners.

If you're just starting your journey with Zwift or structured training plans, this event is for you! During our weekly sessions, you’ll have the opportunity to learn the basics of training.
Each session will be specially designed for you by Dawid (we highly encourage you to check out his Instagram — it’s full of inspiration!), and led by Leszek.
Every workout will involve relatively low intensity — we’ll be riding in zones 2–3, although over time we can’t rule out the occasional effort spike (after all, we know that #IfItHurtsItGrows) 😉
After completing the event, if it’s your first ride with us, you’ll find our team jersey waiting for you in your virtual garage. And if you don’t yet have Leszek’s real-life cycling gear, make sure to check out his store: www.prawie.pro

We’ll ride and train together according to structured training blocks (intervals), which are automatically adjusted to each rider’s fitness level (based on your individual FTP), meaning we all ride as one group — nobody gets left behind!

◾If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product

name: CRYO-GEN Recce / Recovery Monday Group Ride
description:
The Cryo-Gen Monday Recce / Recovery Group Ride has been
organised for those of you who give it your all over the weekend and could
benefit from a zone 2 ride to help flush any toxins from your muscles. This ride
also has a dual purpose to Recce the chosen course for the WTRL Team Time Trial
for the same week for those riders who’d like to Recce the course ahead of time.
The average pace is up to you because the ride is banded.

We are stronger when we work together, a relaxed ride to help you get you ready
for your next big effort, whether it’s a workout, race, or a climb.

name: USMeS – Back to Base [D] 1.8-2.2w/kg
description:
USMeS – Back to Base
Monday Recovery and Regroup, Ease back into the week with Back to Base. This is our Monday recovery ride. Designed to flush out the legs after your weekend missions. Our second recovery ride of the day, if you missed our Back to Work Ride earlier. This ride offering a smooth roll with just a touch of extra effort on the climbs to keep things lively.

 

✅ Pace: 1.8–2.2 w/kg average
✅ Style: Steady endurance with light pushes on the hills
✅ Fence: In use between efforts, we like to drop it for segments but regroup quickly

 

Ride Format:

Mostly steady Zone 2 riding
Gentle tempo on climbs—never all-out
Friendly chat encouraged
 

Expectations:
✅ Respect the recovery vibe - this isn’t a race
✅ When the fence comes down for a segment, regroup promptly behind the beacon
✅ Hydrate, spin easy, and enjoy the company

 

If you’ve logged big miles over the weekend, this is the perfect ride to reset, recover, and roll back to base, starting the week strong.

 

#conqueringlimits

#challengeaccepted

name: Stage 4: Zwift Games: Peaky Pave
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: TBR Happy Snappy Hour
description:
Welcome to TBR Happy Snappy Hour!
The leader (yellow beacon) will hold a pace of 2w/kg during the entire ride. Join the leader for an easy ride!
If you want to challenge yourself then try to chase the red beacon during the efforts each lap. Each effort ends at a sprint or KOM banner (different length each lap). The leader will announce the start of each effort.
Join this ride for the fun and jokes or to train for a race - it's up to you!

eventSubgroups.name: TBR Happy Snappy Hour (D)
eventSubgroups.description:
TBR presents friendly Race Training. Races are often decided on snappy 1-5min efforts, so lets train this! We ride at an all-cat friendly base-pace of 1.5-2wkg, then mix in sharp efforts towards Banners. First aim is always to break new personal Power Records. No matter which category you belong to, we support you to make you stronger!
Visit thebigring.cc for ride reports and more fun events.

name: GXY CHASE [2.6-3.2 W/KG] CAT C
description:
Welcome to GXY CHASE the event with two yellow beacons and one thrilling ride!

Get ready for an exiting new format in Galaxy rides….the GXY CHASE!

This unique event features "TWO YELLOW BEACONS" who lead two groups in a dynamic chase that is all about team work, strategy and progression.

After a short warm up, the chase will begin where both groups will increase power simultaneously with group 2 working to close the gap in a controlled team focused effort. The event is perfect for riders at Cat C power levels and offers the flexibility to switch between groups during the ride. It encourages teamwork and progression, allowing riders to challenge themselves, improve fitness and progress to the higher power group (if they wish) all in the same ride.

This event will also on occasion provide weekly workout plans tailored to group dynamics ensuring variety and excitement.

GXY are a friendly inclusive and supportive club who strive to help others succeed. We are looking forward to riding with you today.

If you want to become a member and join our community to race, ride socially, or both, please come and join ideally via our Facebook link below:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/galaxycyclingclub/
https://www.strava.com/clubs/989894
https://www.instagram.com/galaxycyclingclub

name: Velos Tour de Friends
description:
Newer to Zwift and working to improve your fitness? Recovering from injury? Or just want to ease into the week with a friendly & supportive group? Then come join our gentle D-paced tour around Zwift’s worlds, sharing laughs and fun adventures. We may depart as strangers, but will finish as friends. Each week we feature a pub quiz, play along and have some fun while learning a bit of trivia!

This ride is designed as a step up for beginners with some experience who are looking for something a bit faster. Continuing to challenge yourself is key to getting stronger. Trust that you are joining a ride where the leaders stick to the advertised pace, and where strong sweeps are always available to help anyone struggling at the back finish. We support everyone on our rides so you leave feeling happier than when you started.

We will average 14-18 mph (1.5 w/kg), depending on the course. Late join is available up to 30 minutes in. We hope to welcome you to the Velos family!

Join us at teamvelos.co.uk

name: Forte Race Series
description:
This race is brought to you by Forte Coaching and Commonwealth Games silver medalist Jon Mould.

The races will be competitive across all categories designed to help you practice different tactics and improve your racing.  You will race hard so don't be disheartened if your new tactic doesn't pay off there is always next week! The finish is at the Sprint point so be ready to complete 3 full laps after your first time crossing the line. 

Follow Forte Coaching for more "coach led racing" sessions. www.fortecyclecoaching.com

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: Zwift TT Club Racing - Champs Elysees
description:
The Time Trial. Cycling’s true leveler - just you and your legs versus everyone else in the field.

Come join Zwift TT Club on Zwift for more Time Trial event information! https://www.zwift.com/clubs/b3d1a903-df49-44eb-9c6f-4ba9f0622efe/home

Join us as we embark on a five-week series of events - each week you will have multiple chances to set your best time on the same route!

Over the course of the five weeks, we’ll be increasing the distance of the events.

Check out Zwiftpower.com after your event to see how well you stack up against the competition!

Don’t forget to check you’re using the fastest bike frame and wheels available to you!

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? 
For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H 

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: ZZRC Happy Hour
description:
Welcome to our ZZRC Happy Hour 2.4-2.8wkg. This is a group ride, not a race, where we encourage riding together.

Our rides are open to all riders, the category enforcement merely allows us to ensure a safe and quality ride for you the riders and for our group.

In 2015 ZZRC was founded and are one of the oldest established clubs on Zwift .

YELLOW BEACON will pace between 2.4-2.8 on the ride , with a possible increase of watts on inclines or sprints , but the average for the whole ride will be as advertised.

We strongly promote group riding so on most of our rides we will use the Fence to help encourage that. Using a fence ensures that the ride is not over paced .

In the event of falling off the back of the main group , you will need to pace well over group pace to bridge the gap and catch .

This is where our awesome ZZRC sweeps and Ride Buddies will help you return to group using their draft. They will give you clear encouraging instructions to aid this process .

Our crew are a caring bunch who dedicated a lot of hours to this club , but want you to have the best ride experience on Zwift

You will be fully supported and encouraged throughout the ride by the Leader, Sweeps and Ride Buddies .

Our rides do not allow the use of TT Bikes as they do not draft and will require you to push harder on the ride, and in these instances our Sweeps will not be able to help you .

Mountain bikes operate very similarly, minimum draft so more watts (effort) will be required for the ride and any chase backs to group .

All our rides have a 30 minute late join feature which allows you to rejoin if you have technical issues or you find yourself out of the group in the early stages of the ride. Using this feature SHOULD teleport you back into the main group with our YELLOW BEACON .

Double Draft is used on this ride

We love to have a chat on our rides so join us on our dedicated discord channel
https://discord.gg/QdeS3PtXTX


TOP TIPS

1) Stay close to the ride leader (or just in front on climbs), don’t let a gap form and the elastic snap!

2) Stay away from the Fence – We don’t like to fry anyone

3) Most important of all . . . HAVE FUN AND ENJOY THE RIDE.

#zzrc

Don’t forget to join our ZZRC-We Pace Not Race Facebook page and our club on the companion app

name: WYDB Bash
description:
The WYDB Bash.... Est. and running since April 2020 (after we all got locked down) Every MONDAY evening, we aim to provide a fun, open & competitive event with our popular pre and post Xmas Series. With official partners Endurance Zone & Win Your Dream Bike.

Our rides are normally around 30 minutes in duration on rolling parcours. If you want to spin round socially then feel free!
The 2025 Xmas Series details are below. For results, prizes, and general chat, pls request to join the Facebook group:
https://www.facebook.com/groups/1432995850214015
Run by - www.endurancezone.com 

2025 XMAS SERIES (Wednesday evenings 1820 GMT)

R1 - 24th Nov. Innsbrück. 3 laps
R2 - 1st Dec. Glasgow Crit, Scotland - 8 laps
R3 - 8th Dec. Downtown Dolphin, Crit City - 14 laps
R4 - 15th Dec. Tair Dringfa Fechan, Watopia - 1 lap (A little longer!)
R5  - 22nd Dec. Harrogate Royal Pump Room 8, Yorkshire - 1 lap

We call the 2019 Harrogate World's Circuit our 'home' course and tend to finish each series there. Don't worry about getting dropped - it happens to everyone!

Endurance Zone provides our revolutionary technology that enables organizations to reward their own customers, with sports, fitness, and health rewards, powering them with new ways to engage. Virgin Active, British Triathlon, Thirdspace, British Cycling.
www.endurancezone.com  

If you haven’t heard of Win Your Dream Bike, it's the UK’s PREMIUM bike prize draw competition. £250,000+ of high-end bikes have been won whilst building a community who simply love to ride their bikes - It’s open to anyone and everyone!
Home - Win Your Dream Bike

Enjoy and good luck!

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: 3R Launchpad Ride [~1.0-1.5w/kg avg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack. We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.

#3r

name: Cheesecake Extra Slice
description:
Cheesecake Extra Slice is a fun group ride at an average power of around 3w/kg, but with some optional sprints along the way! Definitely a great way to build your sprint power, or if you just want to ride in the draft with the yellow beacon then that is totally fine also.

There is usually plenty of chat in the bunch for those who enjoy the social side of riding. But if you’ve got a confetti allergy then be warned – there will be some serious confetti being tossed around after each sprint with PBs coming in thick and fast! And if you’ve got anything left in your legs at the end, there might even be an opportunity for a gradual lifting of the pace in the final minutes.

Late join available for up to 30 mins after the ride start. All welcome!

name: Zwift Crit Racing Club - Glasgow Crit Circuit
description:
It's Crit time! Come and join in the fun on a number of multi-lap short routes. Get ready to dig deep and push to the finish line!

What is Racing Score?

Racing Score is an intuitive system that replaces the traditional categories (A - D) with a 0-1000 scale to reflect your current level, considering various metrics like race performances and power. This score helps Zwift recommend the most competitive band to race in, ensuring a fun, rewarding, and exciting experience as you track your progression throughout your Zwift racing adventures.

WHAT IS ZWIFT POWER? For further information on connecting to Zwift Power check out this support page: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/connecting-to-zwiftpower-SyldRc_4H

Please note; for your results to show up in Zwift Power you must be using a Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) and be riding on a smart trainer, smart bike, or using a power meter.

name: PACK Run: 5k Monday
description:
New to running, coming back after some time off, or simply want a nice warm up or cool down session? Join us as we spend 30 minutes moving the legs in this slow-paced, social event. The goal of the event is to encourage folks to move. 

The leader will average 8kph (7:30min/km) // 5mph (12min/mile) and we encourage runners to go at their own pace if the average pace is too fast and/or use a run/walk strategy.

FULL DESCRIPTION

New to running, coming back after some time off, or simply want a nice warm up or cool down session? Join us as we spend 30 minutes moving the legs in this slow-paced, social event. The goal of the event is to encourage folks to move. 

The leader will average 8kph (7:30min/km) // 5mph (12min/mile) for the duration and it is expected everyone will stay together. This is a timed event, so we encourage runners to go at their own pace if the average pace is too fast and/or use a run/walk strategy.

**Note: if you utilize a run/walk strategy, please start with the walking portion so that you are not overrunning the group on each interval.**

Put your black and orange tops and socks on and let's get moving!

Facebook Group: #zwiftpack
https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftpack/

Strava Club:
https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift-pack-runners

Discord Voice Chat:
https://discord.gg/cce7ers

#pack

name: ZSUN Chain Gang
description:
Looking for a challenge? The ZSUN Chain Gang is a fast-paced, structured ride where the focus is on pushing your limits and getting stronger.

This is not a no-drop ride – there are no sweepers and no waiting. Just hold on for as long as you can and try to go a little longer each week.

🗓️
Weekly | 60 mins | Fast pace (3.0+ w/kg)

🏁
Training-focused | Not a race

💪
Build strength, endurance, and focus

🎁
ZSUN kit unlocked after completion

Hang tough and embrace the burn – this is where progress happens.

name: TBR's Sub-2.5 Tuesday Bunchie
description:
Join us for a friendly and social ride around Tick-Tock. We roll tightly together as a bunch, chattering away and generally enjoying each other's company. A side dish of cycling is served up, with many using this ride as a step up in endurance from their standard hour-long pedal. Stay for a little while or a long while - either way, we look forward to having you in our draft!
Our Spotify playlist is filled with different tracks each week and can be found here https://open.spotify.com/playlist/1HVldYQmN6BBHW0FPeg3fP?si=C_IS5QxvSuKtb07oOix-Vw&utm_source=copy-link. Our top tip is to follow the playlist so you can find it easily each week.
Keep within the bunch for the best draft effect, and enjoy practising your control and pacing as you keep yourself within reach of the Beacon. We will average about 36-38km/h within the bunch, sitting comfortably under 2.5w/kg. Our sweeps will do their best to help you back, just give them a yell to let them know - have your Companion App open to join in the onscreen chat, drop Ride-Ons and watch the map for your location in relation to the beacon bunch.
Remember, it's not a race, there are no winners, just a group of people who enjoy each other's company!

Follow TBR at thebigring.cc to learn more about our events, read ride reports and leave feedback.

Welcome to one of the longest running events of Zwift.

Known for our teamwork, blobbiness and fun chat, come join our group ride averaging 2.5-2.8W/kg based upon the particular ride leader on the day.

Positioning close to our Beacon will bring you the best experience and draft.

This is a 60min steady paced group event. (Join/Rejoin up to 30mins)

#ahdr

name: Team Italy Specialissima Race
description:
Welcome to Specialissima Race.

All will start with 1 minute between RS categories.
Expect each race to be highly competitive and have fun!.

CATEGORIES:
Each race will be using Zwift Racing Score (ZRS) for categorization.
Race up a category if your RS is at the top end of a category.
Or if you simply desire an added challenge.

- A: 690 - 1000
- B: 520 - 690
- C: 350 - 520
- D: 180 - 350
- E: 0 - 180

Your Zwift Racing Score is determined by how much success you have in races.
better against people with higher ZRS, then your ZRS may increase. If you place worse than people with lower ZRS, then your score might decrease.
Read more about ZRS here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-BkG9_Rqrh
If your ZRS increases past a category boundary during the series, your points earned will not transfer to the new category with you.

RULES:
A smart trainer or power meter is required.
zPower will be removed.
Heart rate monitors are compulsory for all categories.
No TT bikes unless it’s a TT event.
You need to have a registered account with zwiftpower.com and accept their terms and conditions to be in the results of the race.

PLEASE NOTE:
Race organizers may request riders in all categories to provide a dual recording or a matching RL effort (Strava) in order to verify a Zwift race effort. Failure to comply may result in disqualification from the event. Failure to provide a dual recording or RL effort on three requests may result in disqualification from future events until a dual recording with a matching effort is provided.
Race organizers may exclude a rider from the results due to poor sportsmanship. Examples may be bad language, sandbagging, or other behavior in a disruptive manner.

This is the FB group of Team Italy https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftitaly and Strava Club https://www.strava.com/clubs/zwift_italy

Ride On!

#teamitaly

name: ZTPL Cycling Club Coffee Ride
description:
Zapraszamy na wspólny event z ZTPL Cycling Club. Pamiętajcie o wyborze właściwej grupy.

Z założenia nasze jazdy prowadzą liderzy, którzy pomagają trzymać peleton w ryzach. Jeśli podczas eventu zabraknie lidera, starajcie się trzymać tempo, na które się umówiliśmy w momencie gdy dołączyliście do wybranej grupy. To od Was zależy jak będziecie się bawić 😊
Po ukończonym evencie, jeśli jechaliście z nami pierwszy raz, w Waszym wirtualnym garażu będzie czekała nasza teamowa koszulka!
◾️Grupa E jest grupą początkującą. Tempo jest spokojne, uczymy się jazdy w grupie, jest czas żeby porozmawiać. Jedziemy w przedziale 1.4-1.8 w/kg
◾️Grupa D przeznaczona jest dla średnio zaawansowanych. Tempo będzie oscylować w okolicach 1.8-2.2 w/kg z przodu peletonu (możliwe akcenty).
Ważne: Jeśli wasze FTP jest w granicach 2w/kg to nie będzie grupa dla Was.
◾️Grupa C jedzie w tempie 2.5-3 w/kg (możliwe akcenty). Jeśli Wasze FTP jest w granicy 2.5w/kg nie będzie to dla Was Coffee Ride :)

◾️ Jeśli chcecie przejechać jazdę w tempie Coffee Ride wybierzcie o jedną grupę niżej niż sugeruje wam wasze FTP lub zwiftpower :)
◾️ Wartości podane w opisach dotyczą średniego tempa z CAŁEJ jazdy (nie uwzględniają interwałów, które mogą wystąpić podczas np. podjazdów)
◾️ PAMIĘTAJCIE że podczas jazd grupowych NIE UŻYWAMY ROWERÓW CZASOWYCH!
◾️ Starajcie się pilnować peletonu i nie zgubić koła, samemu bardzo trudno jest odrobić stratę.
◾️ Proszę słuchajcie poleceń lidera, które podczas jazdy wyświetlane są na środku ekranu. Szczególnie jeśli lider zauważy że grupa się porwała.
◾️ Lider, który prowadzi grupę podświetlony jest na żółto.
◾️ Starajcie się jechać blisko lidera, starając się go nie wyprzedać i nie wyjeżdżać przed bramę, która informuje Was że jedziecie za szybko.

◾️Podoba się Wam to co robimy? Zawsze możecie postawić Waszym kochanym administratorom oraz liderom naszych jazd wirtualną kawę :) https://buycoffee.to/ztplcc
◾️Jeśli chcecie sprawić sobie już teraz naszą nową teamową koszulkę ZTPL Cycling Club zapraszamy bezpośrednio na stronę https://inoni.cc/?s=ztpl&post_type=product
◾️Cała gama naszych koszulek oraz informacje o kolejnych Pre-Orderach znajdziecie na https://ztpl.cc/stroje-ztpl-cc/
◾️Nasze casualowe koszulki znajdziecie u Wintertala: https://wintertal.com/pl/133-ztplcc

◾️Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ZwiftPolska
◾️Grupa na facebooku: Polska Społeczność Zwift https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwift.polska
◾️Instagram: #ZTPLCyclingClub https://www.instagram.com/ztpl.cc/
◾️Strava: https://www.strava.com/clubs/182377
◾️Nasz klub w Companionie: https://www.zwift.com/eu/clubs/ztplcc
◾️Nasze wszystkie klubowe jazdy: https://www.zwift.com/eu/events/tag/ztplcc
◾️Nasza strona internetowa: https://ztpl.cc/

#RideOn #ZTPLCC

[ENG]
We would like to invite you to ZTPL Cycling Club Coffee Ride.
In order to ride with Coffee Ride pace, please choose your group wisely.
Our rides are usually led by leaders who help keep the peloton in check. If there is no leader during the event, try to stick to the pace we agreed on when you joined the selected group.
◾️Group E is a beginner group. The pace is calm, we learn how to ride in a Zwift peleton. We will ride with 1.4-1.8 w/kg pace
◾️Group D is between group E and more advanced Group C. Group pace 1.8-2.2w/kg.
Important: If your FTP is around 2 w/kg, it won’t be a Coffee Ride for you.
◾️Group C is more advanced with pace 2.5-3 w/kg

◾️Please listen to the leader’s commands which are displayed in yellow during the whole ride. The leader who leads the group is highlighted in yellow. Please don’t pass the leader.
◾️Please follow the leader instructions! Especially if the leader notices that the group has been swept away. The leader is highlighted in yellow.
◾️At the and wait for the leader’s command: GOGOGO and start your sprint. Enjoy!

◾If you would like to get yourself our ZTPL Cycling Club team jersey please visit our shop https://inoni.cc/en/?s=ztpl&post_type=product

name: Cigala Cycling Social Ride
description:
Welcome to the Cigala Cycling Social Ride

The aim for this ride is to keep everyone together and have fun. We ride at a steady pace of around 1.8-2.2 w/kg.
This is NOT A RACE , but a social activity which will help you to gain some skills, knowledge and confidence. 
The ride will last for 60 minutes, however if you can’t stay that long, join the fun for as long as you like! Late-join also available.

BONUS! Join the ride and unlock the Cigala Cycling Kit! 

ABOUT US
All of your cycling needs at your fingertips. From cycling & triathlon coaching, online store and cycling holidays. Visit the below sites for more.
Coaching -> https://coaching.cigalacycling.com/
Online Store -> https://retail.cigalacycling.com/
Cycling Holidays -> https://travel.cigalacycling.com/

ABOUT THE LEADER
Founder & Head Coach of Cigala Cycling, Matteo Cigala brings with him 25 years of experience between racing as a professional and coaching all levels of cyclists, from amateur to top pros.
You will be sure to learn a lot of tips from getting the most out of your Zwift Social Ride.

FOLLOW US:
Instagram -> https://www.instagram.com/cigalacycling/
Facebook -> https://www.facebook.com/CigalaCycling/
Twitter -> https://twitter.com/cigalacycling

JOIN THE TEAM
Companion App -> https://www.zwift.com/clubs/88217a69-52e6-46eb-b1bb-8d91ccd0b727/home
Zwift Power -> https://zwiftpower.com/team.php?id=20130
Strava -> https://www.strava.com/clubs/cigala-cycling-220050

name: Mountain Massif Group Run
description:
Join Mountain Massif for some relaxed group runs. The goal is to simply complete the route and collect the badge.

More information:
For more information check out the Mountain Massif website www.mountainmassif.com, follow on Instagram, Mountain_Massif and join our Zwift Club, by clicking the link below

name: EVR Europe Race
description:
The EVR Race is intended to provide an entry level race on Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays for A, B, C and D racers in four different timezones. All categories start together. You are encouraged to race with the fastest participants you can keep up with. 

Be prepared for fast starts and hard racing.

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Stage 5: Zwift Games: Three Step Sisters
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: 3R True2&3 Ride [2.0w/kg and 3.0w/kg]
description:
This is a 3R Group Ride Event. Your co-operation and teamwork is essential to the success of the ride and we ask that no riders ride off the front of the group. The event is designed as part of 3R’s package of #ProStyleTraining events to assist with the attainment of your training goals and may include intervals over and below the ride average parameters. This is not a race so please follow the leader beacon's (Yellow) instructions and if you are feeling strong, please help the keeper beacon (Red) to assist other riders back to the pack.  We welcome good banter and aim to create a fun, social atmosphere for your training. We welcome any feedback on our Facebook page https://www.facebook.com/groups/ClubWorldBicycleRelief/ #Team3R #Ride3R #RideRaceRaise.

#3r

name: The Velos Klick - 1km Challenge
description: A klick is a military term for a distance of 1km, and so Team Velos brings you a challenge to complete 1km in the fastest time possible. We will change courses monthly (all Flat courses) and we will have winners from each category at the end of the month. Choose your bike very carefully as it could make all the difference, the challenge is available every night during the week use it as a warm up for a race or just use it to improve your 1km time or power figures, whatever just have fun.

name: EVO CC Sprint Race Series
description:
CATEGORY ENFORCEMENT IS ENABLED FOR ALL EVO RACES!

What is Category Enforcement? 

Category Enforcement will prevent Zwifters from entering a category they are not eligible for.  Our goal is to increase fairness in racing.

HOW DOES IT WORK?

- Zwift checks a racer's past performance using VO2 max and FTP to determine their race category.
- Racers can join a category at or above their category. For example, if you are "C" category, you can race in C, B, or A category. You will not be able to race in the D category and the option to join will be absent.

Welcome to EVO sprintrace series. Shorter more compact races for the rider looking for an effective high intensity race. Start fast, hang on in the middle, then sprint for the win at the finish. Expect to push your heart rate to its maximum. Sprinkle a few of these into your training plan and watch your fitness grow.

To make racing as fair as possible we have enforced a few minor rules that will result in automatic disqualification on ZwiftPower.

All riders must wear a heart rate monitor
Riding in an incorrect category.

zPower riders will be disqualified in A, B, and C Podium. zPower is allowed in the D category. Race details and final results will be available at www.zwiftpower.com

#evo

description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: Monday Run Club
description:
Start your week off right with a group run hosted by the Zwift Runners Facebook Group. We’ll ease into another week of training alongside the community while actively recovering from any long runs you might have had during the weekend. With runs in seven time slots with four pace groups each (A being the fastest and D being the slowest), there’s an event for everyone. 

Pace Groups
A) 7.5–8.5 mph // 12–14 kph
B) 7–7.5 mph // 10.5–12 kph
C) 6–6.5 mph // 9.5–10.5 kph
D) 5–5.5 mph // 8–9 kph

We’ll be using workout mode throughout these runs so everyone can easily determine their speed. Though these runs utilize a mostly steady pace, there will be some speed changes for variety.

If you have any questions about this event or want to find out more about Zwift Run in general, then please visit the Zwift Runners Facebook Group or zwift.com/run

#gozwiftrun #mrc

name: The Euro Chop by AHDR
description:
The Euro Chop by AHDR
The famous Chop Race by AHDR is now in Europe! 
Being ""in the chop"" is an Aussie expression that you won't read about in the UCI rulebook. It's one of the many nuances of bike racing that only comes with experience.

Sometimes when you're in a race and find yourself in the final break-away bunch you might get asked ""are we in the chop?"" or ""are we chopping it?"". This is referring to collusion between the lead riders to work together until the finish. Many times a break-away will be doomed in the final kilometres because everyone starts playing cat and mouse, attacking, sitting up, etc.

But all that goes out the window in the last lap. This is generally where the group comes together and the final push begins. Working together goes out the window and is every man or woman for themselves for the final sprint to the line.

The Euro Chop by AHDR feature mostly flat fast time-based handicap race. Do you always get blown out the back on the start of a multi grade race trying to hang onto the guy going with A grade pushing 5w/kg. Well not on The Chop. Released in Grades there are time splits from D to A with the intention of all coming together at the end for the big finish. Each Grade wears a different AHDR/Zwift kit making each grade easily identifiable on who's wheel you want to catch if they go past.

Races happen on Monday evenings. No single race has been the same. Many variables are at play on The Chop including course (which is generally a flat course), race numbers, and the inevitable sandbaggers. It has been called a team time trail and cat and mouse but the real racers know it only as ""THE CHOP"". Do you have what it takes to take the glory?

#ahdr

name: NPRC - Run Every Day Powered By NoblePro
description:
Come and join the fastest growing running club on Zwift.  With a choice of 5 or 10k you can pick your distance. Whether you are a beginner or experienced runner come and join us, you can run at whatever pace you like, it’s not a race unless you want it to be!

Each day is a different route and as new routes are released the courses will change to allow you to bag that badge.

You will run in our in game NPRC jersey and if you complete the event you get to keep it to wear wherever you like.

We also hold special events where you can win an actual jersey to wear in real life.

NPRC Facebook – We have a facebook group where you can join and talk about all things running.  Share your stories and get help and advice.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/1223724692417314/

NoblePro: - We are a team focused on elevating running through our treadmills and digital platforms. We create treadmills loved by runners and the wider running community for quality engineered hardware features and advanced software integration to give you the freedom to train with the apps you love.
https://www.noble-pro.com/

Kinni:- In a fitness world where treadmill bluetooth integration can be a confusing place, we aim to provide you with the ability to effortlessly connect. You can run structured treadmill workouts, connect and integrate with your favourite bluetooth fitness apps such as Zwift, Rouvy, Kinomaps and many more. We are focused on progress and advancement in integration, connectivity and control.
https://kinni.co/https://kinni.co/devices/ - To see if your treadmill is compatible to link to Zwift.

Join the NoblePro Running Club (NPRC) - https://www.zwift.com/clubs/e7829ccd-bce4-4244-9ccf-4cdc3ef148ff/home

name: TEAM VTO POWERPUSH
description:
⚡️🚴🏼‍♂️💨 POWER PUSH! 🚴🏼‍♂️💨⚡️
Looking for a Group Ride that is different to the rest? You've found it! 👍🏻

We’re building a team...... a TIGHT-KNIT team 💨. We aim to break records over the 7.1km timed Fuego Flats Reverse segment. (The aim of the this ride is to take as many riders as possible with us under 9 mins). We start with a lap and a half to settle the group, recon the course and talk tactics. The hammer drops at about 40 mins and the TEAM TIME TRIAL starts.
As a group we aim to PUSH over 50KPH (31MPH) and hold it all the way to the finish arch. This requires TEAMWORK, POWER and DETERMINATION. You will need to dig deep!

Team VTO value FUN, FRIENDSHIP and DETERMINATION. We welcome athletes from around the world 🙏🏻 🌎

Join our Zwift Club - Team VTO (on your companion app 👉🏻📲 https://www.zwift.com/clubs/151ca95c-f6de-4fe2-ae88-a769e367f439/home

To be involved in our community (+ claim your prizes), join our FB group
www.facebook.com/groups/thenewzwifttrioz/

Absolutely Everyone is welcome! 🙏🏻

name: Beaconsfield Race Club
description: A weekly fast and furious crit around some classic zwift circuits. #beaconsfield

name: Stage 6a: Zwift Games: Epiloch
description:
The spirit of sport and the rush of racing are back for more in this year’s Zwift Games. This isn’t about the podium—it’s about taking part and giving it your all. It’s your chance to join thousands of Zwifters from every corner of the globe, line up together, and see what you’re made of.

Zwift Games celebrates everyone who takes part. It’s the shared challenge, the sense of community, and the feeling of crossing the finish line knowing you gave it your all. Whether you’re chasing a personal best, testing your limits, or just here for the fun, Zwift Games is your stage.

Crit Cade and TT Bonus Stages

Now for the first time, you’ll have a chance to compete against other Zwifters in a gamified race that’s all about steering to pick your line, timing your PowerUps, and hitting boost pads to get ahead. Please note: for the Crit Cade Bonus Stage, a steering-enabled device is required.

In the mood for something more traditional? Hit up the Epiloch TT Bonus Stage to race against the clock through the Scottish Highlands’ punchy hills—no steering-enabled device required!

Unlocks & Rewards

1 Stage = Oakley Sphaera™ Strike Glasses
3 Stages = Zwift Games Kit
5 Stages = Oakley Velo Stelvio™ Helmet
6 Stages = 6000 XP

Zwift Games 2026 GC

Looking for extra motivation? The Zwift Games GC (General Classification) tracks your results across the five main racing stages. Each completed stage adds to your overall GC time, while individual stage standings and separate Bonus Stage rankings let you measure yourself in different ways — with only the five main stages counting toward the overall GC.

VIEW RESULTS: www.zwift.com/racing/leagues/zwiftgames2026

Racing Score

Zwift Racing Score is aimed at pairing you with riders of similar racing abilities to keep racing fun, fair, and competitive. Read the FAQ here: https://support.zwift.com/en_us/racing-score-faq-BkG9_Rqrh

ADVANCED CATEGORY = 650+
CATEGORY RANGE 1 = 0-159 | 160-269 | 270-389 | 390-509 | 510-649
CATEGORY RANGE 2 = 0-209 | 210-329 | 330-449 | 450-569 | 570-724

For riders with a Racing Score of 650 or higher, the' Advanced' category will have separate events scheduled every other hour.

Please note that to enter the Advanced category, you will need the following:
Heart Rate Monitor
Zwift Racing Score of over 650
Smart Trainer/Bike or Power Meter

Stage 1
Route: Kaze Kicker
Date: Feb 16–22

Description: Kick things off with a fast, punchy sprint on Kaze Kicker. A perfect opener to find your legs and feel the race buzz.

Stage 2
Route: Hudson Hustle 
Date: Feb 23–Mar 1 

Description: Stage 2 hits Hudson Hustle with sharp turns and sprint energy. Stay alert, hold position, and finish strong.

Stage 3
Route: Cobbled Crown 
Date: Mar 2–8

Description: Punchy climbs and classic racing vibes await on Cobbled Crown.

Stage 4
Route: Peaky Pavé
Date: Mar 9–15

Description: Time to climb. Peaky Pavé rewards patience, pacing, and strong legs as the Games start to heat up.

Stage 5
Route: Three Step Sisters
Date: Mar 16–22

Description: Go big to finish strong. Three Step Sisters brings an epic test to the finale.

Bonus Stages
Route: The Epiloch (Time Trial) OR Bell Lap (Crit Cade*)

Date: Ride either or both March 23–29
*Steering-enabled device required for Crit-Cade

name: ZMCC EyeballZ
description:
From humble beginnings on Melbourne's Mornington Peninsula, ZMCC has grown to become a favourite hangout within the Zwiftverse. Whether you're looking to push yourself, recover or just spin around - ZMCC is always there for you. Bad dad jokes and questionable banter are just extras you can't buy.

We make the following promises:

We won't yell at the flyers - let them live their imaginary life.
We won't wait for stragglers - we can't help poor event choices or tech issues.
We won't bore or tease you with pretend drinks or snacks.

Join us. Enjoy. You're welcome.

Like and join us on Facebook at https://www.facebook.com/groups/zwiftmelbournecyclingclub

name: Fearless Ladder for a Faster 5k
description:
Want to improve your 5K run time. Join us regularly for this ladder workout and watch your results improve.


We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.” – Aristotle<https://everydaypower.com/aristotle-quotes/>


Join for the challenge and group run fun!


Hosted by Team Fearless. To hear about our other rides and runs or learn more about our women's team, head to our Facebook Fans page at https://www.facebook.com/groups/TeamFearlessZR/

#fear

name: Stage 3 - The Zwift Big Spin
description:
The Zwift Big Spin is back, and adventure is calling. From Fuego Flats to the Mayan Jungle and beyond, it’s time to saddle up and explore far and wide across four epic stages in Watopia. Spin the wheel at every finish line and hunt for hidden spinners along the way. Everything from iconic Big Spin favorites to brand new prizes are up for grabs. What will you win when you explore The Big Spin? There’s only one way to find out: Ride! Spin! Win!

Stage 3
Route: Southern Coast Cruise
Date: March 30 - April 5


For Stage 3, we’re headed to Southern Coast Cruise—it’s not called the Zwift Big Spin for nothing!

name: SROZ's The Avatar is Fine, I'm Dying
description: Welcome to SROZ's The Avatar is Fine, I’m Dying! This isn't about sitting in the wheels or playing tactics in the pack. This is a pure test of grit, pacing, and individual strength. Whether you are chasing a new Personal Best or just want to see where your fitness stands, this is your chance to empty the tank against the clock.

description:

We will aim for average 1.8 wkg.

Keep positive vibes on and Ride On!

name: Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp
description:
The Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp is where the pros put in the work, and this year, you’re invited to join them. Across five weeks of structured training, plus a make-up week, you’ll ride alongside the team on Zwift—sprinting with Jasper Philipsen and Kaden Groves, building endurance with Mathieu van der Poel, and learning from head coach Kristof De Kegel. Don't miss your chance to be a part of the structure, science, and team energy that fuels the WorldTour.

Workout 5: Alpecin-Premier Tech Team Camp

This final session brings it all together. Two long tempo efforts build strong, sustainable endurance and reward the work you’ve done. Settle into a steady rhythm, stay composed, and finish the Alpecin–Premier Tech Training Camp strong!

name: Restart Esports - Monday Mash
description:
Restart Esports - instagram.com/restart.esports

1. Heart Rate Monitor (HRM) is mandatory for all participants.

2. Power Source is Mandatory for all racers. A smart trainer or smart bike should be your power source where possible. ZPower is not allowed. 

3. Dual Recording - Should always be done if you have the capability. All podium positions are expected to dual record or have at least have a recent dual recording history on their profile. Any rider posting high level performances is expected to validate their hardware with dual recordings as a minimum. 

Results WILL be amended (if required), in the interest of fair play, for all Restart Esports hosted events.

name: L'Apero JZQc
description:
Zwift Email: 

Event Name: L'Apéro JZQc

Existing Event Organizer/Owner: yes,-i-am-an-existing-event-organizer/owner

Name of Team/Club/Organization: JZQc

Number of Weekly Events:

Event description: 🟦L’APÉRO JZQc 🟦
https://jzqc.ca/
🚴‍♂️ Chaque lundi à 17 h 15 – La ride semi-relax de début de semaine !
L’Apéro JZQc est une ride hebdomadaire sociale, semi relax, et toujours ouverte à tous.
C’est l’occasion idéale de se dégourdir avant le souper, de jaser un peu et de commencer la semaine avec une belle ambiance.
🌟 Pourquoi participer ?
Parce que l’Apéro, c’est une ride agréable, motivante et accessible à tout le monde.
On roule pour le plaisir, sans pression, dans un esprit de partage, de fun et d’inclusion.
📍 Parcours & leaders – Une surprise chaque semaine !
Chaque lundi :
• Le parcours change et est généralement semi-vallonné — un juste milieu entre les Mercredis JZQc et les Lundis de grimpe.
• Les leaders changent également pour garder la ride vivante et variée.
⏱️ Détails
• Départ : 17 h 15
• Durée : maximum 70 minutes
• Late Join : Activé
• Ouvert à tous
(Le départ plus tôt permet de rouler AVANT le souper et de garder votre soirée familiale libre.)
⚙️ Rythme & fonctionnement
🔹 Suivre les leaders
Selon la semaine, vous pouvez suivre les leaders :
• en mode autonome, (1,8-2,0wk)
• ou en mode élastique.
Peu importe le mode : on s’amuse et on roule ensemble autant que possible.
🔹 Rythme général
Le rythme de l’Apéro est léger, fluide et accessible, parfait pour décompresser après la journée.
🔹 Liberté totale
Durant l’Apéro, chacun peut :
• suivre le leader,
• rouler plus lentement ou plus vite,
• créer son propre peloton,
• ou rouler à son rythme.
Aucune compétition — juste du plaisir, du partage et de la bonne humeur.
🔹 Pour les motivés !
Les plus audacieux peuvent ensuite enchaîner avec les Lundis de grimpe pour un défi supplémentaire. 🏔️😄
🗣️ Communication
Un canal Discord est disponible pour ceux qui veulent discuter ou échanger pendant la ride.
https://discord.gg/VRZb3YmM

Ce n’est pas une obligation : chacun choisit s’il veut parler ou rester silencieux.
Plusieurs canaux sont offerts pour faciliter les échanges, et tous sont accessibles à ceux qui le souhaitent.
🎯 L’objectif de l’Apéro
Créer chaque semaine une ride :
• relax
• semi-vallonnée
• sociale
• accessible
• motivante
• et ouverte à tous
Avec une ambiance chaleureuse JZQc.
💙🟧 On vous attend pour L’Apéro !
Débutant ou expérimenté, tout le monde est bienvenu.
Chaque lundi à 17 h 15, on se retrouve pour une belle ride de fin d’après-midi.

name: BMTR Misfits Social
description:
Whether you’re looking for a recovery ride after your hard efforts from the weekend, or a social ride to get over the Monday blues, the BMTR Misfits Ride is the perfect ride for you!

Our very experienced, friendly, and engaging ride leaders make sure a good time is had by all and keep the ride within the advertised average pace!

The ride will last for 60 minutes. However, if you can't stay that long, join in the fun for as long as you like!

Hope to see you there!
